title: Porcelain
meaning_summary: Porcelain remains one of Moby's strongest earners because it still fits streaming, licensing, and cinematic mood listening extremely well.
revenue_drivers: Play-era familiarity keeps the song active in downtempo and nostalgia playlists.
Its cinematic tone remains highly useful for sync and visual media.
The song continues to benefit from the broader recognition of the Play catalog.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from strong long-tail streaming, sync utility, and creator-side participation typical of the Moby catalog.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled rights and meaningful creator-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to writer-side interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
